_comment: Copy this file to config.json (gitignored) and fill in your values.
_comment_installation_id: A stable ID keeps this image in the rotation across updates.
_comment_pixlet_bin: Optional. Path to the pixlet binary if it isn't on PATH (e.g. on Windows). Defaults to 'pixlet'.
_comment_hero: Which usage window to highlight as the large 'hero' row: "5h" (default) or "7d".
_comment_log_db: Optional. Path to a SQLite database for logging usage over time. Relative paths are resolved from the repo directory. Leave unset to disable logging.
_comment_underutil_rate_per_hr: Optional. Rate-of-change threshold (%/hr) below which a window is considered flat/underutilized. Default: 1.0.
